## TRM1.1. Terminal and airport ANS ATFM arrival delay per flight (KPI#2)

Average ATFM arrival delay in Germany was 0.37 min/arr in 2025, the first year of RP4. The **performance has improved compared to 2024**, last year of RP3, when there were 0.46 min/arr.

The national average is primarily driven by Frankfurt airport, which suffered 0.87 min/arr compared to 1.15 min/arr in 2024. After this improvement, Frankfurt met its individual 2025 target of 0.90 min/arr. The other main airport, Munich, also met its target (0.43 min/arr) by presenting 0.36 min/arr.

Cologne/Bonn airport delay was only slightly above 2024 (0.56 vs 0.53 min/arr), while the rest of airports in RP4 all had between zero (e.g. Hannover, Nuremberg) and 0.16 min/arr (Leipzig).

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM Arrival delay across Member States in 2025 was 0.97 min/arr.
